name: Minot AFB
profile: Military-friendly Minot AFB housing snapshot anchored to Minot / Ward County, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 North Dakota VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Minot.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate including P&I and moderate property taxes

crime_status.installation: High security; gated military community. Extremely safe.
crime_status.metro_minot: Minot is generally very safe; safety is high throughout the city with minor property crime being the main concern.

school_quality.on_base: Dakota Elementary and Memorial Middle (Minot Public Schools).
school_quality.off_base: Minot Public Schools; high schools are well-rated and military-supportive.

rental_vacancy.notes: Healthy supply; rental rates are stable and often below BAH levels.

rental_metrics.notes: Healthy supply; rental rates are stable and often below BAH levels.

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Critical nuclear deterrence mission; tight-knit, highly supportive local community ('Minot Nice').

financial_brief.affordability_summary: One of the most affordable markets for home ownership in the Air Force.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: North Minot (near base) and the newer developments in SW Minot are preferred.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Steady demand with high affordability; equity growth is slow but consistent.

summary_points: Minot Air Force Base sits in the Minot / Ward County housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 1.2% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
One of the most affordable markets for home ownership in the Air Force.
Neighborhood quality varies across Minot, Burlington, Surrey corridor and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Steady demand with high affordability; equity growth is slow but consistent.
opportunities: Minot military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Minot and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Minot.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Minot / Ward County market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Some BAH profiles may be better served by renting than buying in this market.
buyer_notes: Minot buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
North Minot (near base) and the newer developments in SW Minot are preferred.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Minot can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Minot.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Minot.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

base_profile.host_or_major_command: 5th Bomb Wing / 91st Missile Wing / Air Force Global Strike Command
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Minot AFB supports bomber and ICBM nuclear deterrence missions in northern North Dakota with a supportive local community and extreme seasonal weather considerations.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Critical nuclear deterrence mission; tight-knit, highly supportive local community ('Minot Nice').
base_profile.base_bluf: Steady demand with high affordability; equity growth is slow but consistent.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Minot.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Minot.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Minot clients — not generic Minot / Ward County stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Minot is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

commute_intelligence.commute_bluf: For Minot, gate access and traffic timing often matter more than straight-line distance.
primary_commute_factors: Shift schedule or early report time

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Minot housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Minot, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Minot should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

school_guidance.school_zone_warning: Always verify school assignment by exact address before signing a lease or purchase contract.
school_guidance.nearby_school_district_note: Minot Public Schools; high schools are well-rated and military-supportive.
school_guidance.school_liaison_note: Use official school liaison resources where available for military school transition support.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.
childcare_guidance.youth_program_note: Youth programs and school-age care can materially affect family housing decisions.

medical_guidance.primary_medical_anchor: Minot Air Force Base medical services
medical_guidance.medical_warning: Verify clinic availability, pharmacy procedures, and emergency care options directly with official medical sources.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Minot / Ward County metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.
Confirm sponsor contact and unit reporting instructions.
Confirm lodging or temporary housing plan.
Review housing office guidance before signing any lease or purchase contract.
Compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, and debt.

Verify school zones by exact property address.
first_week: Visit or contact the housing office if still deciding between on-base and off-base options.
Drive the commute from target neighborhoods during expected report time.
Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

pcs_watchouts.title: Gate hours can change
pcs_watchouts.message: Use official Minot Air Force Base gate pages before travel or commute planning.

pcs_watchouts.title: Distance is not the same as commute
pcs_watchouts.message: Neighborhoods should be compared by realistic gate access and traffic timing.

pcs_watchouts.title: School zones are address-specific
pcs_watchouts.message: Never assume a school assignment from neighborhood name alone.

pcs_watchouts.title: BAH is not the full affordability picture
pcs_watchouts.message: Users must compare rent or mortgage against income, debt, expenses, utilities, and savings goals.

pcs_watchouts.title: Property taxes and insurance shape true payment
pcs_watchouts.message: In this market, taxes (~1.35%) and insurance assumptions must be included in all-in comparisons.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This Minot AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Minot / Ward County is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
